attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.APPLICATION_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_TYPE_CODE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_DATE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.ENTITY_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_STATUS_CODE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.PROCESS_STATUS_CODE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.EVENT_NUMBER, MF_XLA_EVENTS.ON_HOLD_FLAG, MF_XLA_EVENTS.CREATION_DATE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.CREATED_BY, MF_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_XLA_EVENTS.TRANSACTION_DATE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_1, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_2, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_3, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_NUM_4, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_1, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_2, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_3, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_CHAR_4, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_1, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_2, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_3, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REFERENCE_DATE_4, MF_XLA_EVENTS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.PROGRAM_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.REQUEST_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_BATCH_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_SOURCE_APPLICATION_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.UPG_VALID_FLAG, MF_XLA_EVENTS.BUDGETARY_CONTROL_FLAG, MF_XLA_EVENTS.MERGE_EVENT_SET_ID, MF_XLA_EVENTS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_XLA_EVENTS.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
MF_XLA_EVENTS 
where MF_XLA_EVENTS.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')-1
